design_name: A pipe cross fitting (four-way intersection) with two perpendicular hollow cylindrical pipes of equal dimensions crossing at the origin, forming a continuous '+' shaped hollow interior.
prompt: A pipe cross fitting (four-way intersection). Two hollow pipes of equal size cross perpendicularly. The first pipe is 30mm outer diameter, 24mm inner diameter (3mm wall thickness), 100mm long along the X axis, centered at the origin (from X=-50 to X=50). The second pipe has the same dimensions, 100mm long along the Z axis, centered at the origin (from Z=-50 to Z=50). The two pipes intersect at the origin, creating a continuous hollow + shaped interior. The part is centered at the origin in all axes.
primitive_plan_summary: A pipe cross fitting (four-way intersection) with two perpendicular hollow cylindrical pipes of equal dimensions crossing at the origin, forming a continuous '+' shaped hollow interior.

verifier_score.feedback: All constraints met. The pipe cross fitting is correctly constructed: (1) Bounding box is 100×30×100mm, confirming pipes extend from -50 to +50 along X and Z axes, with 30mm outer diameter (Y extent = 30mm). (2) The part is centered at the origin (center of mass essentially at [0,0,0]). (3) The rendered images clearly show two hollow pipes crossing perpendicularly in a '+' shape — the isometric view (left) shows the cross shape, the high-angle rear view (center) shows the hollow bore visible from above, and the front profile view (right) confirms the continuous hollow interior where both bores intersect. (4) Volume of ~42,110 mm³ is physically plausible: two solid cylinders union volume minus two inner bore cylinders union volume gives approximately π×15²×100 + π×15²×100 - overlap_outer - (π×12²×100 + π×12²×100 - overlap_inner) ≈ 141,372 - overlap_outer - (90,478 - overlap_inner). The outer overlap region is roughly a cylinder-cylinder intersection volume, and the net result aligns with the reported volume. (5) Wall thickness of 3mm (15mm - 12mm radii) is correct. (6) The geometry is valid, watertight, with no self-intersections.
